title: Royal Vanilla+
description: This resource pack gives a customized gaming performance, especially, for CPVP. Enjoy the PVP pack, and get a better and smoother gaming experience!!
body:
**Royal Vanilla+** is a custom resource pack designed especially for Crystal PvP (CPvP). It provides a clean and smooth gameplay experience with customized textures, satisfying font and visuals. The pack is available for multiple Minecraft versions and is optimized to have little to no impact on FPS. Enjoy smoother gameplay, better visibility, and an enhanced PvP experience!!😎😎

**Features:**

- Extreme Low Block Fire
- Low Fire Person Perspective
- Old Enchant Glint
- No Explosion
- No Smoke
- Full Brightness
- Small Totem and Small Totem Pop
- Small Shield and other utilities
- Coloured Bow Shots
- Custom GUI                                    
- Custom font                                                        
- 3D crystals                                   
- PvP-friendly design                           

**Credits:**
- Inspired by Marlowww Vanilla+
- Includes edited assets from KingD3fault
- Pack assembled, made and customized by Me
